name: Emmanuel Kpaan
quote: Staying at Ducor Residences felt like coming home — if home had spectacular city views and the best jollof rice I have ever tasted. A genuinely proud moment for Monrovia.

name: Cynthia Williamson-Cole
quote: I visit Monrovia twice a year for work. I have tried every upscale option in the city. Nothing comes close to Ducor Residences — the quiet, the service, the attention to detail. It is my only choice now.

name: Amara Diallo
quote: I travelled from Dakar for a regional conference and was not expecting much from the accommodation. I left genuinely impressed. The rooftop bar alone is worth the trip.
